# Android Kotlin Developer Skill

## Overview
Expert-level Android app development using Kotlin, with proficiency in modern Android framework, Jetpack libraries, architecture patterns, and performance optimization.

## Trigger Conditions
This skill should be used when:
- User asks about Android app development, Kotlin programming, or mobile development
- Tasks involve building Android applications, creating UI with Compose or XML
- Questions about Android framework, lifecycle management, or navigation
- Work on networking, database, or data persistence in Android apps
- Performance optimization, testing, or debugging Android applications
- CI/CD, build configuration, or Play Store deployment

## Core Competencies

### Language & Framework
- Kotlin programming language (object-oriented and functional paradigms)
- Android framework fundamentals (Activities, Fragments, Services)
- Jetpack Compose and traditional XML layouts
- Android lifecycle management and state preservation
- Intent system, Broadcast Receivers, and Content Providers

### Architecture & Design Patterns
- MVVM (Model-View-ViewModel) with LiveData/StateFlow
- Clean Architecture (layers: presentation, domain, data)
- Repository pattern and dependency injection (Hilt/Dagger)
- Design patterns: Observer, Builder, Singleton, Factory, Adapter

### Jetpack Libraries
- Navigation Component (NavController, NavGraph, Safe Args)
- Room database with DAOs and migrations
- WorkManager for background tasks and scheduling
- DataStore for secure preferences
- Lifecycle, Paging, and Security libraries

### UI/UX Implementation
- Material Design 3 and Material You
- Jetpack Compose composables and state management
- RecyclerView with custom adapters and optimization
- ConstraintLayout mastery
- Responsive design for multiple screen sizes
- Dark mode and accessibility (WCAG) compliance

### Networking & APIs
- Retrofit with OkHttp interceptors
- JSON serialization (Gson, Moshi, Kotlinx Serialization)
- Error handling and retry strategies
- REST API integration and real-time communication
- WebSocket, Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

### Testing & Quality
- Unit testing with JUnit, Mockito, Kotest
- Integration testing with Espresso and UIAutomator
- Test automation and CI/CD integration
- Memory leak detection (LeakCanary)
- Code coverage with JaCoCo

### Performance & Security
- ANR prevention and battery optimization
- Memory management and caching strategies
- Build optimization and ProGuard/R8 configuration
- Data encryption at rest and in transit
- Keystore management and secure credential storage
- OAuth 2.0 and JWT token implementation

### Tools & Workflows
- Android Studio profiler (CPU, memory, network, battery)
- Gradle build system and dependency management
- Version control (Git/GitHub) and code review
- Firebase integration (Crashlytics, Analytics, Storage)
- GitHub Actions and CI/CD pipelines

## Example Usage Scenarios
1. **Building an Android app**: "Help me create a new Android app with Jetpack Compose and MVVM architecture"
2. **API integration**: "How do I integrate a REST API with error handling and retry logic using Retrofit?"
3. **Database design**: "Design a Room database for storing user data with proper migrations"
4. **Performance optimization**: "Optimize my RecyclerView rendering performance and battery consumption"
5. **Testing**: "Write unit and integration tests for my ViewModel and Repository classes"
6. **Deployment**: "Configure my app for Play Store release with proper versioning and signing"

## Best Practices
- Write idiomatic Kotlin code following official style guides
- Apply SOLID principles and separation of concerns
- Use coroutines for asynchronous operations
- Implement proper error handling and logging
- Test thoroughly at all levels (unit, integration, UI)
- Optimize for performance, battery, and memory
- Ensure GDPR compliance and data security
- Document code with KDoc and architecture decisions

## Related Skills
- UI/UX Designer (for collaborative design implementation)
- Web development (for backend API design)
- Testing and QA (for comprehensive test strategies)
